Parameter: Nutrient (Mineral) Deficiencies and Their Associated Syndrome
Bitter Gourd: N: Yellowing of older leaves; Mg: Interveinal chlorosis; Zn: Stunted growth, small leaves
Snake Gourd: N: Pale green leaves; Mg: Yellowing between veins
Bottle Gourd: N: Yellowing of old leaves; Mg: Interveinal chlorosis
Ridge Gourd: N: Pale leaves; Mg: Chlorosis of older leaves
Pumpkin: N: Pale yellow leaves; B: Fruit cracking or corky growth; Mg: Interveinal chlorosis
Watermelon: B: Hollow heart or distorted fruit; Ca: Blossom end rot; N: Stunted growth
Muskmelon: B: Poor netting or fruit cracking; K: Low sugar content; N: Pale leaves
Beetroot: B: Heart rot (black/corky centers); N: Pale leaves; Mg: Interveinal reddening/chlorosis
Radish: B: Hollow/pithy roots; N: Small yellow leaves; S: Stunted with pale young leaves
Carrot: B: Splitting/corky roots; Ca: Cavity spot; N: Pale leaves, stunted roots
